texto: Hey Americans,” he screamed furiously at the drones. “Brothers of the wolf, sisters of the wind, children of the Sun! Send the Choctaw warrior a quick and merciful death, instead of abandoning us into slavery or shameful capture.
explicacao: Citação de George Sorbane sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Hey Americans,” he screamed furiously at the drones. “Brothers of the wolf, sisters of the wind, …” articula reflexao, war, americans em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.
